languages.text: "Он не умирает". {n}Зораэль выдерживает паузу, позволяя вам вникнуть в смысл сказанного.{/n} "Я пытался, человек. Лично сносил его железную голову. Его разум сразу переносится в тело другого некрона".

traits.locale_text: "Он не умирает". {n}Зораэль выдерживает паузу, позволяя вам вникнуть в смысл сказанного.{/n} "Я пытался, человек. Лично сносил его железную голову. Его разум сразу переносится в тело другого некрона".

languages.text: "He will not die." {n}Zorael pauses, allowing you to take in the meaning of what he is saying.{/n} "I have tried, human. I cleaved his iron head from his body myself. His mind immediately transfers to the body of another Necron."
languages.original_text: "Он не умирает". {n}Зораэль выдерживает паузу, позволяя вам вникнуть в смысл сказанного.{/n} "Я пытался, человек. Лично сносил его железную голову. Его разум сразу переносится в тело другого некрона".

traits.locale_text: "He will not die." {n}Zorael pauses, allowing you to take in the meaning of what he is saying.{/n} "I have tried, human. I cleaved his iron head from his body myself. His mind immediately transfers to the body of another Necron."

"He will not die." {n}Zorael pauses, allowing you to take in the meaning of what he is saying.{/n} "I have tried, human. I cleaved his iron head from his body myself. His mind immediately transfers to the body of another Necron."

"He will not die." {n}Zorael pauses, allowing you to take in the meaning of what he is saying.{/n} "I have tried, human. I cleaved his iron head from his body myself. His mind immediately transfers to the body of another Necron."

languages.text: “他不会死的。”{n}佐拉尔顿了顿，容你慢慢理解这句话的含义。{/n}“我试过，人类。我亲手把他的铁脑袋从身体上砍了下来，但他的意识立刻就转移到了另一个太空死灵的身体里。”
languages.original_text: "He will not die." {n}Zorael pauses, allowing you to take in the meaning of what he is saying.{/n} "I have tried, human. I cleaved his iron head from his body myself. His mind immediately transfers to the body of another Necron."

traits.locale_text: “他不会死的。”{n}佐拉尔顿了顿，容你慢慢理解这句话的含义。{/n}“我试过，人类。我亲手把他的铁脑袋从身体上砍了下来，但他的意识立刻就转移到了另一个太空死灵的身体里。”

languages.text: «Porque no puede morir». {n}Zorael hace una pausa para que entiendas lo que quiere decir.{/n} «Lo he intentado, human{mf|o|a}. He arrancado personalmente su cabeza metálica de su cuerpo. Su mente se transfiere inmediatamente al cuerpo de otro Necrón».
languages.original_text: "He will not die." {n}Zorael pauses, allowing you to take in the meaning of what he is saying.{/n} "I have tried, human. I cleaved his iron head from his body myself. His mind immediately transfers to the body of another Necron."

traits.locale_text: «Porque no puede morir». {n}Zorael hace una pausa para que entiendas lo que quiere decir.{/n} «Lo he intentado, human{mf|o|a}. He arrancado personalmente su cabeza metálica de su cuerpo. Su mente se transfiere inmediatamente al cuerpo de otro Necrón».

languages.text: « Il ne peut pas mourir. » {n}Zorael s'interrompt, vous laissant vous imprégner du poids de ses mots.{/n} « J'ai essayé, humain. Je l'ai décapité moi-même. Son esprit s'est immédiatement transféré dans le corps d'un autre Nécron. »
languages.original_text: "He will not die." {n}Zorael pauses, allowing you to take in the meaning of what he is saying.{/n} "I have tried, human. I cleaved his iron head from his body myself. His mind immediately transfers to the body of another Necron."

traits.locale_text: « Il ne peut pas mourir. » {n}Zorael s'interrompt, vous laissant vous imprégner du poids de ses mots.{/n} « J'ai essayé, humain. Je l'ai décapité moi-même. Son esprit s'est immédiatement transféré dans le corps d'un autre Nécron. »

languages.text: "O ölmeyecek." {n}Zorael duraklıyor ve söylediği şeyin anlamını kavraman için bekliyor.{/n} "Denedim insan. Demir kafasını gövdesinden kendi ellerimle kopardım. Zihni derhâl başka bir Nekron'un bedenine aktarılıyor."
languages.original_text: "He will not die." {n}Zorael pauses, allowing you to take in the meaning of what he is saying.{/n} "I have tried, human. I cleaved his iron head from his body myself. His mind immediately transfers to the body of another Necron."

traits.locale_text: "O ölmeyecek." {n}Zorael duraklıyor ve söylediği şeyin anlamını kavraman için bekliyor.{/n} "Denedim insan. Demir kafasını gövdesinden kendi ellerimle kopardım. Zihni derhâl başka bir Nekron'un bedenine aktarılıyor."

languages.text: "Er wird nicht sterben." {n}Zorael hält inne, damit du die Bedeutung seiner Worte erfassen kannst.{/n} "Ich habe es versucht, Mensch. Ich habe seinen eisernen Schädel selbst vom Rumpf getrennt. Sein Verstand fährt sofort in den Körper eines anderen Necrons."
languages.original_text: "He will not die." {n}Zorael pauses, allowing you to take in the meaning of what he is saying.{/n} "I have tried, human. I cleaved his iron head from his body myself. His mind immediately transfers to the body of another Necron."

traits.locale_text: "Er wird nicht sterben." {n}Zorael hält inne, damit du die Bedeutung seiner Worte erfassen kannst.{/n} "Ich habe es versucht, Mensch. Ich habe seinen eisernen Schädel selbst vom Rumpf getrennt. Sein Verstand fährt sofort in den Körper eines anderen Necrons."

languages.text: 「彼は死なない」{n}ゾラエルは言葉を置いて、あなたが彼の言葉の意味を理解するのを待った。{/n}「人間、私は試みた。彼の鉄の頭部を自ら彼の体から切り離した。彼の意識はすぐに別のネクロンの体に転移する」
languages.original_text: "He will not die." {n}Zorael pauses, allowing you to take in the meaning of what he is saying.{/n} "I have tried, human. I cleaved his iron head from his body myself. His mind immediately transfers to the body of another Necron."

traits.locale_text: 「彼は死なない」{n}ゾラエルは言葉を置いて、あなたが彼の言葉の意味を理解するのを待った。{/n}「人間、私は試みた。彼の鉄の頭部を自ら彼の体から切り離した。彼の意識はすぐに別のネクロンの体に転移する」
